solution.title: Ready to reveal your
solution.description: Discover our amber-based treatments, formulated to enhance your skin and hair every day. A unique sensory experience, between luxury and nature.

footer.tagline: AMBRA — Precious amber-based treatments, to enhance your beauty every day.

faq.q1: What is amber and what are its benefits?
faq.q2: Are your products suitable for sensitive skin?
faq.q3: Where do your ingredients come from?
faq.q4: How do I choose the right treatment for my skin type?
faq.q5: Do you offer delivery in France and internationally?
faq.a1: Amber is a fossil resin with soothing and regenerating properties recognized for centuries. At AMBRA, we use a purified amber extract, rich in succinic acid, which promotes the skin's natural radiance and strengthens hair fiber.
faq.a2: Yes, all our treatments are formulated with gentle, natural ingredients and dermatologically tested. They are suitable for sensitive skin and contain no parabens, sulfates, or silicones.
faq.a3: Our amber comes from the Baltic Sea, renowned for the exceptional quality of its resins. Other ingredients are sourced from certified organic producers, mainly in France and Europe.
faq.a4: We offer a personalized diagnosis on our website. You can also contact us directly for advice tailored to your specific needs.
faq.a5: Yes, we deliver throughout metropolitan France within 48 hours and internationally within 5 to 7 business days. Delivery is free in France for orders over €60.

achievements.framerDesc: Our formulas are organically certified and meet the highest standards.
achievements.dribbbleDesc: None of our products are tested on animals. Ethical beauty guaranteed.
achievements.awwwardsDesc: All our treatments are formulated and manufactured in France, with respect for the environment.
